title: The 2025 Salesforce Customer Success Awards
author: Jim Roth, Lori Steele

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: Across industries and around the world, customers are transforming their businesses with Agentforce — and we had the incredible opportunity to celebrate them at Dreamforce. During the Customer Success Keynote, we honored this year’s award-winning customers and spotlighted their inspiring stories of innovation and impact. The Customer Success Awards showcased three best-in-class Agentforce customers who are leading the way in becoming agentic enterprises. Their stories highlighted bold ideas, measurable business results, and the real-world power of trusted AI. Whether you joined us live at Moscone or tuned in online, the energy was electric and the insights were unforgettable.Catch the replay on Salesforce+to hear directly from our winners and discover their best tips for accelerating your own agentic transformation.

sections.heading: Hear from our winners
sections.text: Asymblis both a Salesforce customer and a consulting and technology partner that reimagined hiring and onboarding using a combination ofAgentforce,Slack,Sales Cloud,Data Cloud, and Asymbl’s Recruiter Suite solution available through theAppExchange. Take advantage of this moment andlearn howAsymbl can help you design, manage, and scale a blended workforce of human and digital workers. Engine, a global travel platform, used Agentforce, Data Cloud, andService Cloudto scale customer service while improving experience and reducing support time. Their top tips for success: Tip 1 – Tap Salesforce experts to accelerate launch:Engage Forward Deployed Engineers,Professional Servicesorpartnersfor proven implementation patterns – then transition ownership to a dedicated internal Admin.Tip 2 – Channel ruthless prioritization:Start with one high-impact use case and build a minimum viable agent (MVA) that solves it exceptionally well.Tip 3 – Think modular, not monolithic:Keep agents management, with 3-4 topics and related actions for reliability and agility.Tip 4 – Observe and fine-tune:Continuously monitor and adjust your agents’ performance using feedback and CSAT scores. Want more tips from Engine? Tune in toMeasuring AI’s Impact: 5 Tips to Prove Business Value, a webinar with Engine’s SVP of Operations, Mollie Bodensteiner. Read on to learn more about the Salesforce Customer Success Awards program and the nomination criteria. Customer success has always been at the heart of what we do. These awards are about more than celebrating great results, they’re about recognizing leaders who are reimagining how work gets done with AI. Agentforce is unlocking new levels of innovation, trust, and impact. The best part is, we’re just getting started. raw_html:
Across industries and around the world, customers are transforming their businesses with Agentforce — and we had the incredible opportunity to celebrate them at Dreamforce. During the Customer Success Keynote, we honored this year’s award-winning customers and spotlighted their inspiring stories of innovation and impact.

The Customer Success Awards showcased three best-in-class Agentforce customers who are leading the way in becoming agentic enterprises. Their stories highlighted bold ideas, measurable business results, and the real-world power of trusted AI.

Whether you joined us live at Moscone or tuned in online, the energy was electric and the insights were unforgettable. Catch the replay on Salesforce+ to hear directly from our winners and discover their best tips for accelerating your own agentic transformation.

Hear from our winners

Asymbl is both a Salesforce customer and a consulting and technology partner that reimagined hiring and onboarding using a combination of Agentforce, Slack, Sales Cloud, Data Cloud, and Asymbl’s Recruiter Suite solution available through the AppExchange. 

Their top tips for success: 

  • Tip 1 – Make AI agents part of the team: Use Agentforce to handle administrative tasks, freeing your people to focus on the human side of hiring – like interviews and mentorship. 
  • Tip 2 – Turn competition into a roadmap: Friendly competitions can reveal what motivates teams and inspire new ideas for becoming an agentic enterprise.
  • Tip 3 – Make Slack your workflow hub: Integrate AI agents into Slack to automate approvals and streamline workflows where collaboration already happens. 
  • Tip 4 – Build expertise (and partnerships): Use Trailhead, Agentblazer Status, and certifications to build confidence in maintaining your solution – and lean on experts and partners to scale effectively. 

Take advantage of this moment and learn how Asymbl can help you design, manage, and scale a blended workforce of human and digital workers.

Engine, a global travel platform, used Agentforce, Data Cloud, and Service Cloud to scale customer service while improving experience and reducing support time. 

Their top tips for success: 

  • Tip 1 – Tap Salesforce experts to accelerate launch: Engage Forward Deployed Engineers,  Professional Services or partners for proven implementation patterns –  then transition ownership to a dedicated internal Admin.
  • Tip 2 – Channel ruthless prioritization: Start with one high-impact use case and build a minimum viable agent (MVA) that solves it exceptionally well. 
  • Tip 3 – Think modular, not monolithic: Keep agents management, with 3-4 topics and related actions for reliability and agility. 
  • Tip 4 – Observe and fine-tune: Continuously monitor and adjust your agents’ performance using feedback and CSAT scores. 

Want more tips from Engine? Tune in to Measuring AI’s Impact: 5 Tips to Prove Business Value, a webinar with Engine’s SVP of Operations, Mollie Bodensteiner. 

Read on to learn more about the Salesforce Customer Success Awards program and the nomination criteria.

Transform your business with Agentforce

Create a path for lasting Agentforce success with the help of our AI experts.

Get the guide

What are the Salesforce Customer Success Awards?

This year the focus is on celebrating customers who have demonstrated outstanding Agentforce success. The awards recognize customers’ innovative use of Salesforce technology to achieve their business goals.  

Who was eligible to participate?

In order to be nominated, you had to meet the following criteria:

  • Be a current Salesforce customer
  • Be live on Agentforce with an active agent or multiple agents
  • Engage with Customer Success resources and offerings (ex: Trailhead, Premier or Signature Success Plan, Salesforce Professional Services, etc.) 
  • Demonstrate measurable business impact and results 

How were nominations evaluated?

Nominations were judged based on three key criteria that showcase outstanding customer success:

  • Compelling Business Challenge: How significant and urgent was the problem you set out to solve?
  • Innovative Use of Multi-Cloud Solutions: How creatively did you leverage Agentforce and the broader Salesforce platform to deliver a unique solution?
  • Customer ROI and Measurable Impact: What tangible results, success metrics, or clear indicators demonstrate your business impact?

Here is the full scoring criteria that was used to evaluate each nomination.

Stay tuned for the next Salesforce Customer Success Awards! Sign up here to be the first to get notified when the 2026 nominations process opens.
